allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p.get\('version'\)\); deps = {**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['react','typescript','webpack','overwolf','electron','sass','tailwind']\)]")
